description: A pair of open-toed beige sandals with low-top styling and buckle fasteningSynthetic leather upper, has a strap across the forefoot with cut-out, floral and stud detail, has an ankle loop secured with a buckle closureSoft footbed with stitch detail and branding on the heelTPR outsole with textured patterns, has a wedge heel with a textured look on the sidesWarranty: 30 days from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects only
